items.title: In latest Global Stable Hyper OS ver.3.0.308.0 firmware Esim doesn`t works  at all
items.content_text: In the latest global stable firmware version, the ESIM menu tab doesn't work at all . Firmware version: latest, OS3.0.308.0. Phone model: Xiaomi Mi 17 Ultra . Phone version: global, not for CN market. Bootloader: unlocked . To clearly understand the problem and what's depicted in the screenshot: it's completely impossible to access the ESIM menu. Of course, ESIM use is enabled on the previous screen, but this has no effect. Enabling/disabling airplane mode... Read more

items.title: Rear Display notification disappearance
items.content_text: So after .eu rom installation (I didn't really check if it was still there before), whenever I hear a notification, it beeps both in the front and rear screen. The rear screen gives a notification for the time being but when I try to check later what notification was there, it's always empty. Always Although the notification is in the front screen, showing all the content. Any idea? Logcat: log_pandora_OS3.0.315.0.WBLCNXM.txt drive.google.com

items.title: Can't install MiMover after factory reset
items.content_text: Hello. I discovered an annoying issue on Cupid (Xiaomi 12) with OS3.0.3.0.VLCCNXM. After doing a system restore it is unable to install the MiMover application to copy the setting from an existing device, this was working on OS3.0.2.0.VLCCNXM, but unfortunately the server is not showing this revision anymore... Is it possible, to solve this issue to the next update or is there some mirror to get the prev. version of ROM files? The second thing is, after the any shut down and power on cycle... Re

items.title: Locking bootloder Xiaomi 17
items.content_text: Hi gents, i was with xiaomi 17 3.0.302.0  WPCEUXM.C07 rom with EU device. However due to the call recorder and any other apps , i unlocked the boot loader and flashed 3.0.302.0 WPCMIXM.C07 rom. Source : https://mifirm.net/download/21763 I am quite happy with rom and want to re lock the boot loader. Is there any safety way to do it withouth being bricked the device ? Will it trigger any other issues in the future if i want to unlock again ? Thanks in advance.

items.content_text: I have xiaomi 14 ultra (Chines version) I downloaded the HyperOs Global Rom and when flashed this Rom I choose Clean All and Lock. After the flash complete the phone restart and and then it showed that "This MIUI version can't be installed on this device", I choose wipe data, then reboot. Now the phone stuck at Fastboot screen whatever I press still the same fastboot screen. tried to reflash it again using different roms (Chinaes, Golobal, EE) it shows that it cannot be erased because it is... items.title: [Bug] The earpiece suddenly loses audio during the call
items.content_text: Xiaomi 17 Pro Max (popsicle) OS3.0.45.0.WPBCNXM by xiaomi.eu Observed behavior: The earpiece suddenly loses audio during the call Speakerphone continues to work normally , because it uses a different audio routing path in the system. The bug is likely related to: The new Qualcomm unified audio driver stack (2026) The HyperOS audio HAL (Hardware Abstraction Layer) A possible conflict between the earpiece routing and the VoIP/telephony... items.title: Poco F7 Pro - Revolut, Google Wallet, and government apps not working
items.content_text: Good morning, I installed the ROM on my Poco F7 Pro and it is rooted. My banking apps are working, but the only apps that still detect the presence of root/the unlocked bootloader are: Revolut, Google Wallet, and a government app. I am using KernelSU version 3.2.4 as my root manager and I have the following modules installed. However, despite this, I cannot get the aforementioned apps to launch. Thank you very much.

items.title: How to root Xiaomi 14 pro (EU rom can't find required boot image) codename : shennong
items.content_text: Greetings, I recently bougth this phone refurbished and it came with an unlocked bootloader and global eu rom Hyperos 3.0.6.0 WNMIXN and i don't know where to find it. Since the rom is "fake global" i can't use my banking details on it anyways so i wanted to root it but can't access the boot.img from anywhere. I'm not sure i can just pull my boot image from another rom either. Would be nice too if i could also get a custom recovery of some sort going instead of the stock chinese recovery but...

items.title: [Bug] Select best photo doesn't work
items.content_text: Option select best photo in a Gallery doesn't seem to work on my 17 ultra (nezha). I'm on a 3.0.307.0 It doesn't mark any photos at all no matter if the switch is on or off. It work on my older phone, where I hold a finger just like to highlight more photos and it crowns the best one.

items.title: How to publish a widget for HyperOS
items.content_text: I am developing an Android app whose primary feature is a home screen widget implemented as a standard Android App Widget using Jetpack Glance. On HyperOS, I noticed that most Android widgets appear under a separate "Android widgets" section, while some third-party widgets (for example Spotify) are listed directly among the native HyperOS widgets. Is there any specific AndroidManifest configuration, widget metadata, or other requirement that determines where a widget is displayed in the... Read

items.title: Subway Surfers Lag and FPS Drops on Xiaomi Devices – Any Fixes?
items.content_text: Hi everyone, I've noticed that Subway Surfers doesn't always run as smoothly as expected on my Xiaomi phone, even though the hardware should be more than capable. Occasionally I experience frame drops, slight stuttering, or inconsistent performance during longer runs. I've already tried enabling Game Turbo, clearing the game's cache, and closing background apps, but the issue still appears from time to time. Has anyone using a Xiaomi device experienced the same issue? If so, have you... Read mor

items.title: Are OTA updates possible on the European Hybrid ROM for HyperOS 3?
items.content_text: I just got the bootloader unlocked on my 17 Pro Max. And successfully installed HyperOS 3.0.315.0 Is there any real possibility of having regular OTA updates instead of having to wipe my device every single time when manually flashing a new version?

items.title: Battery saver doesn't save setting for Vanced MicroG
items.content_text: I have this weird bug for a year or more now. Every time I disable battery saver for Vanced MicroG, it works for a while and then it reverts back to default option, thus causing Vanced notification to pop up regarding battery saver. I completely wiped android and reinstalled only for this, and the bug is still there.

items.content_text: I wanted to link my account to the "MI Unlock" device, but it says "The place where the account is registered does not match the place where the device is sold," even though I bought the phone from the market in my country and did everything in my country. Even using a VPN doesn't help. The firmware model is MIUI Global 14.0.2.0 (TSZCNSZ).

items.title: No service on Poco M8 Pro 5G (flourite)
items.content_text: I just installed the latest release of xiaomi.eu HyperOS 3 to my Poco M8 Pro 5G. However, I now get no service at all. I know the SIM-card is good, because it works on other phones. I know the phone is good, because before I unlocked the bootloader, I used it on the stock ROM and it worked just fine. Does anyone have any idea what I'm doing wrong, or what the bug might be? The phone is pretty much useless this way, which is a real shame.

items.title: Xiaomi Strengthens Data Protection with Independent Audit of Compliance
items.content_text: BEIJING , Feb. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Xiaomi , a consumer electronics and smart manufacturing company with smartphones and smart hardware connected by an IoT platform at its core, has today announced the findings of an independent review into its data protection compliance.

items.title: Xiaomi Strengthens Its Position on Consumer IoT Security with Proposed Global Common Standards

items.content_text: BEIJING , Nov. 11, 2021 /PRNewswire/ -- Xiaomi Corporation (" Xiaomi " or the "Group"), a consumer electronics and smart manufacturing company, has been given a top rating for its IoT security by the Internet of Things Security Foundation (IoTSF).
